transcript.text:
[2nd visit to Yokji Island?]
Why did you come here again for?
I will be living here for a month
[Tzuyang's Fishing Village Life (Feat. Living in Yokji Island for a Month)]
[I Will Show you my New Home!]
[A Nice Ocean-View from Tzuyang's Yokji House]
[Tzuyang's transportation: Red Emma]
[Best Driver]
[My Town's Delicious Foods]
What? You ate all of this?
[What in the world..]
Just put the trap over there
The octopus will come to the trap
[Omw to catch the octopus]
[Traps are ready]
[With Red Emma]

[I got it!]
[Meal taken care of]
[Take the bait and you're dead~ ♥]
[Fresh caught fish sashimi]
[Quick Snack]
What should I eat tomorrow?
[King Chef Tzu-ryong]
[Tzuyang's Black Bean Noodles]
[Ramyun=Late Night Snack]
[Special Guest: Bugs]
[Yokji Island Seafood Murderer]
[I will take care of my own meals]
[Welcome to Yokji Island]
Tzuyang, we welcome you!
[Tzuyang's Fishing Village Life Day 1]
[What's the first thing to do?]

[Saying hello to the neighbors]
I'm going to be here for a month
Are you going to be riding that all night?
No, no I do mukbang
Where do you live?
In a town nearby this one
Grandpa, Hello!
Do you remember me?
Of course!
[Grandpa from Tong Young Ep.1]
What makes you come here again?
I will be living here for a month
Is that so?
Go over there then
They might give you some free food
A lot of people came by because of you

Really though, You helped them a lot
Hello~ It's been a long time!
I've been selling a lot thanks to you
Really? How much?
Everyone said that they came because of you
Tzuyang Tzuyang She's here
Hello~
When did you come?
Come follow us to catch seafood some time Can I?
Yes
You have to be nice to the captain of the boat
Can she even catch anything?
I feel like I met everyone that I met last time
That's so cool
[Looking at some seafood]
What is this?

Why are they all so big?
20,000 Won worth of Sea Cucumber And 1 Yellow Tail, please
2 mackerels, and also 20,000 Won worth of these
That's going to be delicious Wow, so big!
Thank you
[Just eating a little bit since she's here already]
[Let's go home now]
Hello everyone~
I moved to a new place today
I will be here for a month
The location is..
Do you remember when I came to Tong Young last time?
This is Yokji Island
And this is my ride Red Emma
Red convertible
So cool

I'm here for some healing
That's my house for a month
[Let's go home]
[Chat: If a wild boar comes out, it'll be Tzuyang's BBQ]
What did you say?
Look at that ocean-view
And pool Swimming pool
[Super optimistic]
Swimming pool~
That scared me
Is that real?
It's so big! It's as big as my fist
It's a little cute now
And also.. ta-da
My home
It's very cozy

I have 2 rooms
It's pretty spacious, right?
There's the ocean-view
Kitchen
What is this? A heater?
That looks very antique
A steamed sweet potato would be delicious
Restroom
It's a bit small, but it's fine
It's elevated from the floor
So I can't reach the ground with my feet
[Chat: Short legs!] No! I don't have short legs!
[Intruder alert]
They disappear when I get this out
[They are fast!]
I'm craving some Ramyun noodles because I ate a lot of sashimi just now

I will eat it outside
Check out the atmosphere
Let's start cooking
[Chat: You have to deliver Black Bean Noodles for the new home (Tradition)] Guys, I'm so doomed
I inserted my address in the delivery app
And it was empty Not even a single place
There's a bug! A spider!
That's not a good start
The water is everything for Ramyun
Let's just eat 4 packs
[Gas ON]
[It's opened]
That's cool
Let's go set up the table
It got really dark
I can't go out!!

Don't come here
I'm not scared of stupid bugs!
Please stop talking about the monster moth That's horrible
Let's go
That looks good
People eat insects and stuff
It happens, right?
I have kimchi in my pocket
Bon appetit
I don't have a cup
[Drink from the bottle]
They didn't have the plum juice in the market
Outdoor Ramyun noodle is the best
Is that a cicada? I hear a bunch of them
That's really hot
Yummy

That tastes so good
Frogs
Crickets
And cicadas
The noodles are a bit bloated, but it's still good
It tastes different eating it outdoors
Frog croaks
I'm scared of frogs
[Chat: Let's do a frog mukbang] No way, I don't eat frogs
I can eat anything
Except for frogs and insects I will never eat those
[Chat: How about silkworm pupas?]
I can eat those
But it's still gross so I cringe a bit
I don't enjoy it
[Chat: Is the background green screen?]

No it's not
I'm outdoors
You can hear it too
Mother!!!
I'm terrified
He's not going away
Will I be okay..?
Will I be okay?
I'm going to eat quickly and go inside
That is humongous! What is that?
[Chat: Tinkerbell] Tinkerbell?
No.. way..
I'm going to eat it really quick
[Chat: Look behind you] No, there's nothing in the back!
[Chat: Behind you]
I really hate it I want to stop eating

[Gives up mukbang]
[Chat: How is she going to live here for a month? Don't leave us here Tzuyang!]
[Takes the camera and runs]
There's a bug here so I can't go inside How do I go inside!?
It's ridiculously big CRAZY
It's as big as my finger!
[Chat: That's so tiny and cute. You're so much bigger] It's really big!!
Look, it's big!
[Chat: Pet it] NO
Let's go inside
Help me Don't move, don't you move
Please don't move
[Finally inside]
[Chat: Tame it] No way!!
I don't want to do mukbang now
I'm going to go home today

[Gives up]
How am I going to live here for a month?
[Chat: Bring the Ramyun. Saving Private Ramyun]
I can't The floor was full of bugs
I didn't know at first because I was too busy eating
Really
I barely even brought the camera in I almost left it outside
[Chat: You're exaggerating] No, I'm not!
I can't save Private Ramyun
Do I have to? Really?
Did you guys not see the insects on the doors?
I'm not exaggerating! You guys have never seen a person that despises bugs?
Okay, fine
[Plan to save the noodles]
I'm not over-doing it
I'm so scared

What if it lands on my arm?
[Fully prepped]
Eat it outdoors..? There's no way
Mom!!
It was hiding under the pot
I'm sorry
Thankfully it's a small one
[Rescued]
I'm sweating
It's like udon noodles now
I don't think any of them got in here
How about in here?
No bugs
What should I do with all of the bugs?
Is there a way to get used to them? Why do I hate them so much?
Bees are okay

Bees are pretty cute
But the other ones are too..
I really hate them
[Chat: Your mom is scared of bugs, right?] Well, of course but not as much as me
Mosquitoes and flies are okay because I've seen them so much
Actually, I'm scared of flies
I'm scared of snails too
I hate stuff that crawls
Something that moves like a worm
I'm going to rest up now I'm very exhausted from moving and stuff
I wonder if I will be okay with all these insects
[On the next episode]
